topics.title: Radio Show Intro Song Debate
topics.summary: The studio explores the possibility of replacing their long-standing intro music with a song titled "Time" before discussing recent election results, personal anecdotes about voting, and various hygiene products.

topics.title: Hygiene Habits and Personal Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features a candid discussion regarding personal hygiene routines, the use of wet wipes, travel experiences involving public restrooms, and various personal topics including chess, fitness, and relationship dynamics.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Parenting Decisions
topics.summary: The studio explores a caller's dilemma regarding his partner's desire for children versus his own reluctance, while also discussing personal anecdotes about parenting, political opinions from callers, and various pop culture references.

topics.title: Comedy Stories and Television Trends
topics.summary: The studio discusses a new book of comedy road stories, the presence of old show content on YouTube, and current trends in television programming.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Radio Industry Commentary
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on Hollywood trends, celebrity impersonators, radio industry statistics following Howard Stern's departure from CBS, and listener feedback regarding various guests and segments.

topics.title: Playboy Centerfold Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a discussion with Cindy Margolis regarding her recent Playboy pictorial, her personal life, and her experiences with surrogacy.

topics.title: Cindy Margolis Playboy Spread and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features Cindy Margolis discussing her recent Playboy photoshoot, personal experiences with colonics, and various aspects of her sex life and marriage.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio features a guest appearance by Cindy Margolis, discussions regarding celebrity images like Britney Spears and Reese Witherspoon, and segments covering listener questions and upcoming radio appearances.

topics.title: Comedy Show Segments and Comedy Rules
topics.summary: The studio reviews various comedy clips, discusses the upcoming schedule for local shows, and debates the boundaries of offensive humor in stand-up comedy.

topics.title: Comedy Club Performances and Riley Martin's Claims
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming comedy shows at Carnegie Hall, a recent roast of celebrity chef Mario Batali, and the bizarre telepathic claims made by comedian Riley Martin.

topics.title: Radio Show Scheduling and Content Disputes
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding a humorous anecdote from the 1970s, followed by a debate over a colleague's request for more airtime during the morning drive.

topics.title: Celebrity Prenups, Family Dynamics, and Stalking Cases
topics.summary: The studio discusses a celebrity's prenuptial agreement regarding property and support payments, the public behavior of Emilio Estevez, the upbringing of Paris Hilton, and legal proceedings involving a stalker of Hilary Duff.

topics.title: Midterm Election Results and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the 2008 midterm election results, including the Democratic gains in the House and various state governorships, while also commenting on television segments, celebrity news, and social issues.

topics.title: Current Events and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The studio covers various topics including religious commentary on sexuality, political updates regarding Arnold Schwarzenegger and abortion legislation, celebrity news involving Dustin Hoffman and the People's Choice Awards, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
